title: Workspace crashes due to memory exhaustion
symptom: The workspace becomes unavailable with a 'Workspace offline (503)' message during scheduled workflow runs. This occurs consistently when the workflow is triggered.
not_this_if: The workflow runs successfully in another n8n Cloud account
root_cause: The error occurs because the `$getWorkflowStaticData('node')` arrays (`seenPlaceIds`, `seenEmails`) grow indefinitely with each execution. This accumulation of data can lead to memory exhaustion, causing the workspace to crash and return a 503 error.
fix_steps: Add a check at the start of the Code node to monitor the size of `seenPlaceIds` and `seenEmails`.
Implement logic to prune or reset these arrays when they exceed a certain size, such as keeping only the last 5000 entries.
agent_instruction: Modify the Code node to include logic that limits the size of static data arrays.
